full_text:
Zheng Xiaotong 鄭小同
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Xiaotong (鄭小同)was born in Gaomi county, Beihai commandery. One of Cao Mao’s Five Experienced, executed by Sima Zhao. Zheng Xiaotong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zheng Xiaotong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
